title: Lesson Nine: Saber, si and long sentences
concepts: In this lesson you'll start to see how you can already know how to put together long and complex sentences'

sentences.english: Why doesn't He/She want to know

sentences.spanish: Quiero saber por qué no quiere saber
sentences.english: I want to know why he doesn't want to know
I want to know if you (formal) want to know
I want to know if he/she wants to know
I don't want to imagine it

sentences.spanish: Quiero saber por qué no quiere venir a la casa a visitarme
sentences.english: I want to know why she doesn't want to come to the house to visit me

sentences.spanish: Voy a invitarlo pero no voy a invitarlo ahora
sentences.english: I'm going to invite him but I'm not going to invite him now
I want to start it now
He/She wants to start it now
Why doesn't he/she want to inform me
I'm not trying to justify myself

sentences.spanish: No intento justificarme pero quiero explicarte algo
sentences.english: I'm not trying to justify myself but I want to explain something to you
